name: Spicy Marinated Shrimp and Garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the garlic cloves after parboiling them.
2. Heat olive oil in a wide, heavy-bottomed skillet over low heat.
3. Add all remaining ingredients except shrimp and parsley to the skillet.
4. Cook gently, stirring occasionally, for 15 minutes.
5. Increase heat and add shrimp to the mixture. Cook, tossing shrimp constantly in hot oil, until they just turn pink and begin to curl. Do not overcook.
6. Transfer shrimp mixture into a bowl. Cover and refrigerate for a day or so.
7. Sprinkle with fresh parsley before serving.
